text:
Leorio The HUNTER × DOCTOR (レオリオ ｔｈｅ ＨＵＮＴＥＲ × ＤＯＣＴＯＲ, Reorio zā Hantā × Dokutā) is a character song from the 2011 Hunter × Hunter anime adaptation, performed by Keiji Fujiwara as Leorio Paradinight. The song was released on 03/07/2012 on the album Character Song Collection.
